src: Virto Commerce Frontend - B2B SPA is a fresh look on the field of eCommerce solutions. This is a place where common B2B and B2C scenarios are combined with the most bleeding edge technologies to deliver blazing fast and fully functional solution. It implements common business use-cases needed for a vast majority of projects we build.
ja: Virto Commerce Frontend - B2Bシングルページアプリケーション。最先端技術でB2B・B2Cシナリオを統合した高速・高機能なeCommerceソリューション
